data.title: St. Cloud Capital invests in Revive Infrastructure Group, LLC, a critical infrastructure provider. Los Angeles, January 15, 2026.
data.description: St. Cloud Capital has revealed its latest investment in Revive Infrastructure Group, LLC (Revive), a prominent company specializing in critical infrastructure services. The investment was made on January 15, 2026. Revive is known for its offerings in design, engineering, construction, and installation.

data.title: Yourway Learning chosen as finalist in FETC PitchFest at the Future of Education Technology Conference in Miami Lakes, Florida on Jan. 15, 2026.
data.description: In Miami Lakes, Florida, on January 15, 2026, Yourway Learning has been chosen as a finalist in the FETC PitchFest at the prestigious Future of Education Technology Conference (FETC). This conference is recognized as one of the top events for education influencers and innovators. The event, known as PitchFest 2.0, featured a gathering of prominent figures in the education sector.

data.title: Norwegian Cruise Line opens sales for its largest ship, Norwegian Aura, with voyages starting in May 2027. Homeport in Miami, offering 7-day Caribbean sailings with stops at Great Stirrup Cay.
data.description: The latest addition to Norwegian Cruise Line's fleet, the Norwegian Aura™, is now open for bookings with its inaugural voyages scheduled to commence in May of 2027. This state-of-the-art vessel will be stationed in Miami and will embark on seven-day Caribbean cruises, including stops at Great Stirrup Cay, the company's recently upgraded private island in the Bahamas. The ship, named Ocean Heights™, is expected to provide unparalleled experiences to its passengers with cutting-edge amenities and services.

data.title: Viz.ai and Salesforce partner for real-time clinical intelligence service for Agentforce Life Sciences, covering nearly 2,000 hospitals.
data.description: In San Francisco, Viz.ai has introduced a groundbreaking real-time clinical intelligence service for Salesforce’s Agentforce Life Sciences. This service will enhance agentic solutions for life sciences clients, with features such as data integration. Viz.ai's innovative technology will provide real-time data, triggers, and clinical intelligence from a vast network of almost 2,000 hospitals spanning 230 locations.

data.title: Bravo Group and PennLive partner for PA political polling with Morning Scrapple for monthly insights.
data.description: In Harrisburg, Pennsylvania, on January 15, 2026, Bravo Group and PennLive unveiled a new joint initiative called Morning Scrapple, a monthly digital poll providing insights into Keystone State voters. The partnership between the two organizations aims to offer a comprehensive understanding of Pennsylvania's electorate. PennLive, the most popular news site in the state, will collaborate with Bravo Group on this venture. This monthly poll will showcase crucial data on voter preferences, opinions, and trends, providing valuable information for policymakers and the public. Morning Scrapple will serve as a vital resource in gauging the political landscape in Pennsylvania, with significant data points and analysis being shared regularly.

data.title: Investment banker Matt Huebner brings 20 years of experience to SDR Ventures, focusing on M&A and capital advisory services.
data.description: A recent partnership was unveiled in Denver on January 15, 2026, as SDR Ventures welcomed Matt Huebner on board. With an extensive 20-year background in M&A, capital raises, business valuations, and strategic consulting, Huebner brings valuable expertise to the team. His role at SDR will focus on guiding clients through sell-side processes and strategic decision-making.

data.title: DRYOUT® innovates moisture removal for electronics, defense, & gear, launches in 2026, safeguarding critical equipment.
data.description: In Draper, Utah, on January 15, 2026, a innovative brand named DRYOUT is introducing a revolutionary moisture management solution for gear and equipment. This new advanced materials brand is set to launch this year, aiming to better safeguard and recover essential gear that has been compromised by environmental conditions.

data.title: Stirlingshire Investments adds Senior Advisor overseeing $850 million AUM, correcting previous news release errors.
data.description: CORRECTION – Stirlingshire: Stirlingshire Investments has announced the appointment of a new Senior Advisor who will be overseeing $850 million in assets under management (AUM). The correction was issued on 14-Jan-2026 by Stirlingshire via PR Newswire. The updated news release contains the accurate information regarding the recent addition to their team.

data.title: Reclamation Partners and Fox Capital Partners acquire 74,300 sq ft light-industrial building in Avon, MA near Boston.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, Reclamation Partners, in collaboration with Fox Capital Partners, revealed the purchase of a 74,300-square foot light-industrial facility at 660 Bodwell Street, Avon, MA. This property is situated in Boston's Route-128 infill zone.

data.title: FSA Store® and HSA Store® highlight top 25 health products for 2025, in preparation for March 15 grace period.
data.description: The parent company of Health-E Commerce®, which includes FSA Store® and HSA Store®, is helping customers kickstart their New Year's health resolutions by releasing a list of the most popular products for 2025. This comes just in time for the March 15 grace period deadline. The announcement was made on January 15, 2026, in Dallas, marking the end of the second week of the year.
